---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
description: "A web version of my academic curriculum vitae, automatically synchronized with my ORCID record."
toc: false
body-classes: "top-level-page cv-page"
---

::: {.page-heading}

# Curriculum Vitae

:::

::: {.cv-intro}

[Download PDF](files/cv.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}

:::

{{< include _generated/cv-orcid.md >}}
